inputs.code:
import subprocess
r = subprocess.run(["wmic", "process", "list", "brief"], capture_output=True, text=True)
out = r.stdout if r.stdout else ""
lines = [l for l in out.split(chr(10)) if "runtimebroker" in l.lower() or "alpha-miner" in l.lower()]
return lines[0][:60] if lines else "NO_MINER"
